creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Piotr Kubaj from comment #18)

My example in comment 19 is based on FreeBSD clang version 8.0.1 used to
buildworld and buildkernel to produce the system that was running,
not based on clang 9. (As well as ELFv1, not ELFv2.) The context predates
the update to clang 9 in head. (It is just what I happened to already
have around for powerpc64.)
